title: Pro Breeze Osmo® Dehumidifier - Silent & Refillable Moisture Absorber for Damp & Condensation at Home, Bedroom, Wardrobe, Car - Bathroom Mould Remover with 700g Refillable Tablet - No Power Required
features: REUSABLE, ECO-FRIENDLY DESIGN: The Osmo Dehumidifier features a refillable water tank, removing up to 1L of moisture from the air. Unlike disposable dehumidifiers such as hanging bags or crystals, our 2025 Moisture Absorber can be used over and over again, helping to reduce waste and improve your carbon footprint.

UP TO 100 DAYS EXTRACTION: Our mould and mildew remover extracts moisture for up to 100 days - much longer than other brands. Even after the tablet dissolves and turns into slush inside the water tank, the calcium-rich water continues to remove humidity from the air. Only empty the water tank when the indicator shows full.

ZERO NOISE, NO ELECTRICITY REQUIRED: Osmo can be used in any room, and no electricity or plug is required - the perfect bathroom dehumidifier for tackling mould in small spaces. Operating without batteries or power, this mould remover is completely silent (0 dB) - ideal for use in nurseries, children's bedrooms, or offices.

FAST ACTING & LONG-LASTING: Unlike other dehumidifiers for home, our moisture absorber uses an extra-large 700g tablet instead of crystals to dehumidify your space faster and longer (up to 100 days). With no additional layer and a large surface area, it removes significantly more moisture from the interior than competitors.

INNOVATIVE DESIGN: The 360° perforated design absorbs moisture from around, leaving every corner and window dry. The ergonomic shape features a safety grid lid, a water viewing portal and a large spout for mess-free emptying, instantly tackling wet windows and humid rooms.

STYLISH & PORTABLE: Small and lightweight, this portable dehumidifier comes in 4 different colours to match your style, and it will look great in any home, bathroom or kitchen. The dehumidifier for bathroom is easy to blend in with any home decor, perfect for your household essentials.
